title: Iran team trains through World Cup uncertainty
full_text:
Iran team trains through World Cup uncertainty
Iran team trains through World Cup uncertainty
Al Jazeera exclusive footage follows Iran’s national football team as they train for the World Cup in Turkiye. FIFA has approved moving the team’s base from the US state of Arizona to the Mexican border city of Tijuana, a move Iranian officials say will help avoid complications in light of the US-Israeli war on Iran.
Published On 24 May 2026
